home.whatIsContent: A tier list is a ranking system that organizes items into hierarchical tiers, typically labeled from S (the best) to F (the worst). Originally popularized in the fighting game community, tier lists have become a universal way to rank everything from video game characters and weapons to movies, food, and music. Our free tier list maker lets you create professional-looking tier lists with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.
home.howToTitle: How to Use Our Tier List Maker
home.howToStep1: Upload images or add text items to the item pool. You can drag and drop image files directly, paste URLs, or type item names manually.
home.howToStep2: Drag items from the pool into your desired tier. Rearrange items within tiers or move them between tiers until you're satisfied with your ranking.
home.howToStep3: Export your completed tier list as a high-quality image. Share it on social media, Discord, Reddit, or anywhere you want.
home.feature1: Intuitive drag-and-drop ranking system that works on both desktop and mobile devices.
home.feature2: Upload your own images or add text-only items. Supports PNG, JPG, GIF, and WebP formats.
home.feature3: Add, remove, rename, and recolor tiers to match your needs. Default S-F scale included.
home.feature4: Download your tier list as a high-quality PNG image, perfect for sharing on social media.
home.feature5: Start creating tier lists immediately. No account needed, no watermarks on free exports.
home.feature6: Fully responsive design that works great on phones, tablets, and desktops.
home.seoTitle: The Ultimate Free Tier List Maker
home.seoBlock1Title: Create a Tier List in Seconds
home.seoBlock1: Looking for the fastest way to create a tier list? Our tier list maker lets you build stunning tier lists with zero setup. Simply upload your images, drag items into S/A/B/C/D/F tiers, and export a shareable image. Whether you want to rank anime characters, video game weapons, or your favorite movies, you can create tier lists that look professional without any design skills. No downloads, no sign-ups — just open the page and start ranking.
home.seoBlock2Title: Why Choose This Tier List Creator?
home.seoBlock2: There are many tier list creators out there, but most are cluttered with ads or require you to create an account before you can make a tier list. Our tool is different: it's a tier list maker free of charge, free of ads, and free of friction. Everything runs in your browser, so your images never leave your device. The drag-and-drop interface is smooth on both desktop and mobile, making it easy to create tier lists on the go.
home.seoBlock3: Tier lists organize items into ranked tiers from best to worst. The S tier represents the absolute best picks, while lower tiers like D and F are reserved for the weakest options. People use tier lists to settle debates, share opinions, and spark conversations. From competitive gaming communities ranking character strength to food bloggers ranking fast food chains, tier lists have become one of the most popular formats for visual ranking on the internet.
home.seoBlock4Title: Make Tier Lists for Any Topic
home.seoBlock4: You can make tier lists for virtually anything. Popular categories include video game character tier lists, anime tier lists, movie tier lists, music album tier lists, sports player tier lists, and food tier lists. Our maker supports custom images and text labels, so you're not limited to pre-built templates. Upload your own screenshots, photos, or logos to create a tier list that's uniquely yours.
home.seoBlock5: Once you've finished ranking, export your tier list as a high-resolution PNG image. Share your tierlists on Reddit, Discord, Twitter/X, Instagram, TikTok, or any other platform. The exported image includes your tier labels and colors, so viewers immediately understand your rankings. Many content creators use our tool to create tier list graphics for YouTube thumbnails and social media posts.
home.seoBlock6: Not sure where to start? Browse our built-in templates to quickly tier list create sessions for popular topics like Pokemon, League of Legends champions, anime series, and trending movies. Each template comes pre-loaded with items so you can jump straight into ranking. Of course, you can always start from scratch and build a completely custom tier list.
home.tierMeaningTitle: What Does Each Tier Mean? (S/A/B/C/D/F Explained)
home.tierMeaningIntro: When you create a tier list, each tier represents a different level of quality or preference. Understanding what each tier means helps you make tier lists that others can immediately understand:
home.tierS: S Tier — The absolute best. "S" stands for "Super" or "Special." Items in S tier are considered top-of-the-line, the cream of the crop. When you make a tier list, S tier should be reserved for only the most exceptional picks.
home.tierA: A Tier — Excellent. These items are outstanding but fall just short of perfection. A-tier picks are strong, reliable, and highly recommended in any tier list.
home.tierB: B Tier — Good. Solid choices that perform well in most situations. B-tier items are above average and worth considering when you create tier lists for competitive topics.
home.tierC: C Tier — Average. These items are decent but unremarkable. They get the job done but won't impress anyone. In most tier lists, C tier is the middle ground.
home.tierD: D Tier — Below average. These items have notable weaknesses or drawbacks. They might work in specific situations but are generally not recommended.
home.tierF: F Tier — The worst. Items placed in F tier are considered failures or the least desirable options. Every tier list needs an F tier to give meaning to the rankings above it.
home.topicsTitle: Popular Tier List Ideas & Topics to Rank
home.topicsIntro: Need inspiration for your next tier list? Here are the most popular categories people use our tier list maker for:
home.topic1: Rank your favorite video game characters, weapons, maps, or entire game franchises. Gaming tier lists are the original tier list format, born in the fighting game community. Create a tier list for League of Legends champions, Genshin Impact characters, Valorant agents, Pokemon, Smash Bros fighters, or any game with a roster of characters to compare.
home.topic2: Anime fans love debating which series, characters, or openings are the best. Use our tier list creator to rank anime series by genre, animation quality, or storyline. Popular anime tier lists include Naruto characters, One Piece arcs, Dragon Ball transformations, and seasonal anime rankings.
home.topic3: From Marvel movies to horror franchises, tier lists are the perfect way to rank films. Create tier lists for Oscar winners, Netflix originals, sitcoms, or an entire director's filmography. TV show tier lists are equally popular — rank episodes of your favorite series or compare shows within a genre.
home.topic4: Fast food chains, snack brands, pizza toppings, energy drinks, cereal brands — food tier lists spark some of the most passionate debates online. Make a tier list of your local restaurants or rank popular chain restaurants to share with friends.
home.topic5: Albums, songs, artists, genres — music tier lists let you express your taste visually. Rank every album by your favorite artist, compare music decades, or create a tier list of the greatest songs of all time.
home.topic6: Rank NFL quarterbacks, NBA players, soccer clubs, or Olympic athletes. Sports tier lists are perfect for settling debates with friends and making predictions for upcoming seasons.
home.tipsTitle: Tips for Creating the Best Tier Lists
home.tip1: Before you start dragging items into tiers, decide what you're ranking by. Are you ranking by power level, popularity, personal preference, or competitive viability? Clear criteria make your tier list more meaningful and easier for others to understand when you share it.
home.tip2: The easiest way to make a tier list is to identify your S-tier and F-tier picks first. Once you know the best and worst, everything else falls into place naturally. This approach saves time and prevents overthinking the middle tiers.
home.tip3: Tier lists are meant to be fun and spark discussion. There's no objectively correct tier list — that's what makes them interesting. Create a tier list that reflects your honest opinion, even if it's controversial. The most-shared tierlists are often the ones with hot takes.
home.tip4: Tier lists with images get significantly more engagement than text-only lists. Our tier list maker supports custom image uploads, so take a few extra minutes to add character portraits, album covers, or logos. Visual tier lists are more shareable and look more professional.
home.comparisonTitle: Online Tier List Maker vs. Other Methods
home.comparisonIntro: There are several ways to create a tier list, but using a dedicated online tier list maker is by far the easiest:
home.comparison1: The fastest method. Upload images, drag and drop to rank, and export in seconds. No design skills needed. Our free tier list maker handles all the layout, colors, and formatting automatically. Perfect for anyone who wants to create a tier list quickly without installing any software.
home.comparison2: Maximum flexibility but extremely time-consuming. You'd need to manually create the grid, place each item, align everything, and handle colors yourself. This method can take 30+ minutes for a single tier list that our maker produces in under a minute.
home.comparison3: Functional but ugly. Spreadsheets can organize rankings but produce bland-looking tier lists that don't stand out on social media. You also lose the satisfying drag-and-drop experience that makes tier list creation fun.
home.faq1Q: Is this tier list maker completely free?
home.faq1A: Yes! Our tier list maker is 100% free to use. You can create unlimited tier lists, add unlimited items, and export your tier lists as images without any cost or account registration.
home.faq2Q: Can I use my own images in the tier list?
home.faq2A: Absolutely! You can upload your own images by dragging and dropping them into the tool, or by clicking the upload button. We support PNG, JPG, GIF, and WebP image formats.
home.faq3Q: How do I share my tier list?
home.faq3A: Once you've finished ranking your items, click the 'Export as Image' button to download your tier list as a PNG file. You can then share this image on any platform like Twitter, Reddit, Discord, or Instagram.
home.faq4Q: Does it work on mobile devices?
home.faq4A: Yes! Our tier list maker is fully responsive and works on smartphones, tablets, and desktop computers. The drag-and-drop interface is optimized for touch screens.
home.faq5Q: Can I customize the tier labels and colors?
home.faq5A: Yes, you can rename any tier label and change the tier colors to match your preferences. You can also add new tiers or remove existing ones.
home.faq6A: Your tier list data is saved locally in your browser. This means your work persists between sessions on the same device, but is not synced across devices.
home.faq7Q: What is the best free tier list maker?
home.faq7A: TierList.Best is one of the best free tier list makers available online. It offers a clean, ad-free interface with drag-and-drop ranking, custom image uploads, customizable tier colors and labels, and instant PNG export — all completely free with no account required.
home.faq8Q: How do I create a tier list online?
home.faq8A: To create a tier list online, visit our tier list maker and click 'Start Creating'. Upload your images or add text items, then drag and drop them into S/A/B/C/D/F tiers to rank them. When you're happy with your rankings, click 'Export as Image' to download and share your tier list.
home.faq9Q: Can I make a tier list without signing up?
home.faq9A: Yes! You can make a tier list immediately without creating an account, signing up, or providing any personal information. Our tier list maker is designed to be as frictionless as possible — just open the page and start ranking.
home.faq10Q: What are tier lists used for?
home.faq10A: Tier lists are used to visually rank and compare items across many categories. Gamers use them to rank characters and weapons. Movie fans create tier lists of their favorite films. Food enthusiasts rank restaurants and snacks. Content creators use tier lists to drive engagement on YouTube, TikTok, and social media. They're also used in business for prioritization and decision-making.
home.faq11Q: How do I share my tier list on social media?
home.faq11A: After creating your tier list, click the 'Export as Image' button to download it as a high-quality PNG file. You can then upload this image directly to any social media platform including Twitter/X, Reddit, Discord, Instagram, Facebook, or TikTok. The image includes all your tier labels and colors for easy readability.

footer.tagline: The easiest way to create and share tier lists online.
